# Knight Group Handyman Services LLC

> Registered and insured handyman services in Safety Harbor and Pinellas County, Florida. Free written estimates. Call or text (813) 649-3341.

Knight Group Handyman Services LLC serves homeowners across Safety Harbor, Clearwater, Dunedin, Palm Harbor, Largo, Oldsmar, Seminole, St. Petersburg, Tampa, and nearby Pinellas, Hillsborough, and Pasco County communities with handyman-scope repairs, fixture plumbing, drywall, carpentry, painting, doors, and punch-list work.

Owner Vince Knight brings journeyman plumbing experience and a Florida property-management background. Knight Group publishes transparent pricing ($75–$150/hr) with **no 2-hour minimum** on small jobs.
